creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: swills
Date: Thu Oct 24 18:49:46 2013
New Revision: 331512
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331512

Log:
  A jQuery plugin for drop-in fix binded events problem caused by Turbolinks
  
  WWW: https://github.com/kossnocorp/jquery.turbolinks
  
  PR:		ports/182732
  Submitted by:	Loic Blot <loic.blot@unix-experience.fr>

Added:
  head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/
  head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/www/Makefile

Modified: head/www/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 18:41:12 2013	(r331511)
+++ head/www/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 18:49:46 2013	(r331512)
@@ -1771,6 +1771,7 @@
     SUBDIR += rubygem-jekyll
     SUBDIR += rubygem-journey
     SUBDIR += rubygem-jquery-rails
+    SUBDIR += rubygem-jquery-turbolinks
     SUBDIR += rubygem-jquery-ui-rails
     SUBDIR += rubygem-jruby-rack
     SUBDIR += rubygem-jwt

Added: head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 18:49:46 2013	(r331512)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	jquery-turbolinks
+PORTVERSION=	2.0.1
+CATEGORIES=	www rubygems
+MASTER_SITES=	RG
+
+MAINTAINER=	ruby@FreeBSD.org
+COMMENT=	jQuery plugin for drop-in fix binded events problem caused by Turbolinks
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-railties>=3.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-railties \
+		rubygem-turbolinks>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-turbolinks
+
+USE_RUBY=	yes
+USE_RUBYGEMS=	yes
+RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
+
+NO_STAGE=	yes
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/distinfo	Thu Oct 24 18:49:46 2013	(r331512)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (rubygem/jquery-turbolinks-2.0.1.gem) = 6d9a82a44ddf652f74b6181e5892860cdbda3f000eb1497fa91e3dc098d9ca34
+SIZE (rubygem/jquery-turbolinks-2.0.1.gem) = 10752

Added: head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/www/rubygem-jquery-turbolinks/pkg-descr	Thu Oct 24 18:49:46 2013	(r331512)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+A jQuery plugin for drop-in fix binded events problem caused by Turbolinks
+
+WWW: https://github.com/kossnocorp/jquery.turbolinks
